description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior walls are clad in a light tan brick or stone texture, and the house features multiple evenly spaced rectangular windows with black frames on all sides. The front of the house includes a single main door with a small circular window and a driveway leading to a parked red car, bordered by a gravel or concrete surface. The interior layout is visible from above, showing several partitioned rooms with white walls and doors. The overall structure is boxy and functional, with no decorative overhangs or porches, emphasizing simplicity and practicality.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with tan brick walls, flat roof, and evenly spaced black-framed windows. The front features a driveway with a red car and a simple main door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, driveway, and a red car parked in front of the house.
description_view_1: Left-side view displaying the side wall with multiple windows and the driveway extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back wall with symmetrical rows of windows and no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the side wall with windows and the driveway with the red car extending to the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a circular window, no porch or overhang, direct access from driveway
